title: lycopodium clavatum var. desvauxianum
intro: Lycopodium clavatum var. desvauxianum, commonly known as Desvaux's club moss, is a variant of the Lycopodium clavatum plant species, which belongs to the lycopodiaceous family of plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium clavatum var. desvauxianum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
